en: A: How is the weather today?

ab: tevuta anga a qadav, nazalangzan a kinaqadavan.
en: The sun is coming out, it's very hot.
A: Is it going to be cold outside?
B: It's very cold, so wear lots of clothes.
A: Will it be hot outside?
B: No, it's windy and cool.
A: How is the weather today?

ab: tucu a vuaq inika vucelelj inika zalangzang, nasulapelj.
ch: B:今天不冷也不熱，很舒服。
en: B: It's neither cold nor hot today, very comfortable.

ab: tucu a vengin namakuda a kinaqadavan?
en: A: How is the weather tonight?

ab: neka nu qerepus i kalevelevan, tevutavuta a qiljas.
ch: B:天空沒有雲，星星出來了。
en: B: There were no clouds in the sky; the stars came out.
A: How is the weather outside?

ab: tjau meljay a qadav kasawni, maqadav anga, tevutanga a ’uljivangeraw.
ch: B:雨剛剛停，出了太陽，彩虹出來了。
en: B: The rain has just stopped, the sun has come out, the rainbow is coming out.

ab: namakuda a kinaqadavan izua i tjanusun?
en: A: What's the weather like where you are?
B: We're going to have a big storm here.
A: How's the weather there?
B: Good, the sun is coming out.
A: I have to go to school.

ab: vucelelj a kinaqadavan, itung ngu a pakaliyav.
en: B: The weather is very cold, so wear more clothes.

ab: uri vaik anga ken a sema masasaw.
en: A: I'm going out.

ab: nusauni palj’aca a qemudjalj, paqenetju anga kemacu ta qausua.
ch: B:等一下會下大雨，你要記得帶傘。
en: B: It's going to rain heavily, you have to remember to bring an umbrella.
A: Is it going to rain?

ch: B:剛剛打雷了，等一下應該就會下雨。
en: B: There was thunder just now, and it's supposed to rain later.
A: Is it raining?
A: Is it raining?

ab: namaya ta naqemudjalj anga, teveteveng a djalan.
ch: B:好像下過雨了，馬路是濕的。
en: B: It seems to have rained and the road is wet.

ab: naqemudjalj? aku saljeveljever a su kinacavacavan?
ch: A:有下雨嗎?你怎麼全身都濕了?
en: A: Is it raining? Why are you all wet?

ab: qemudjaqudjalj a i sasaw, inika ken a namasi qausua.
ch: B:外面在下雨，我沒有帶雨傘。
en: B: It's raining outside, so I didn't bring an umbrella.
A: Are you all right?

ab: kudral a vali, saqetju a ku qulu ta vinalian.
en: B: The wind is blowing so hard that my head hurts.
A: Are you all right?

ab: paramur a qadav, malingac a ku qulu ta kinirasian.
ch: B:太陽好大，曬得我頭好暈。
en: B: The sun is so big, it makes me dizzy.
